# wai

> Command-line workflow manager for AI-driven development. Preserves research, reasoning, and design decisions alongside the spec — the *why* behind every architectural choice, not just what was built.

## Authorship

All code in this repository was generated by a large language model. Human contribution: requirements, design decisions, planning, and review.

Leer en español: https://charly-vibes.github.io/charly-vibes/
